steps.title: Turn each percent change into a multiplier
steps.content: $a$ is $65\%$ less than $b$, so $35\%$ of $b$ remains: $$a=0.35b$$ Also, $c$ is $40\%$ greater than $a$, so $$c=1.40a$$

steps.title: Confirm the grid-in answer
steps.content: Since $c=0.49b$, the number $c$ is $0.49$ times $b$. Enter .49 or 0.49.
